completedPhaseClaims.notes: Retrospective once-before-implement spec-review for full-delivery workflow. Trust classification CURRENT for all four artifacts (spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, scenario-manifest.json). Zero drift findings; no dispatch to bubbles.workflow mode=improve-existing required; managed docs already in sync via SCOPE-2 doc-vs-CLI parity check.
Dispatcher arm + lane wrapper + shell canary delivered; RED→GREEN proof captured; broader test-dispatcher routing unchanged (verified by canary §5).

Playwright config + fail-loud SST consumer (requireSmackerelBaseUrl) + csp.ts skeleton + run_node_tooling helper + auto-discovered shell unit test delivered. RED proof: silent ?? default in env.ts caught by static-composition block (exit 1). GREEN proof: TP-077-01-03 driver PASS (node:test + exit-code propagation across STUB_EXIT=0|7|127 + missing-binary case). SCOPE-1a dispatcher canary still PASS after seam handoff (sections 4 + 7 updated to assert run_node_tooling routing).

Lifecycle wiring (bring_up_test_stack + tear_down_test_stack + e2e_ui_compose with --project-name smackerel-test-e2e-ui + EXIT/INT/TERM traps + SST-derived SMACKEREL_BASE_URL) shipped in scripts/runtime/web-e2e-ui.sh. proof_of_life.spec.ts shipped. Go integration tests TP-077-01-02 + TP-077-01-05 PASS (both static contracts) with RED proofs captured. SCOPE-1a + SCOPE-1b canaries still PASS via the SMACKEREL_E2E_UI_NPX-gated lifecycle bypass. Live-run evidence: containers observed under smackerel-test-e2e-ui-* prefix; trap teardown verified. UNRESOLVED FINDING: TP-077-01-01 + TP-077-01-01R GREEN against live stack not achieved this turn because smackerel-core failed its healthcheck within COMPOSE_WAIT_TIMEOUT_S=180s on the fresh-build run; routed to harden/runtime owner. Scope 1c lifecycle deliverables are complete; the open-finding gates the SCN-077-A01 DoD item only.

Discovery convention pin (tests/unit/web/spec_077_discovery_convention_test.sh) PASS. CI workflow .github/workflows/e2e-ui.yml ships invoking ./smackerel.sh test e2e-ui on push to main + PR with Playwright artifact upload on failure (TP-077-02-04 Go integration test PASS). Doc-vs-CLI parity check (tests/unit/docs/spec_077_test_category_parity_test.sh) PASS. docs/Testing.md, README.md, .github/copilot-instructions.md updated to surface the new e2e-ui category. web/pwa/tests/auto_discovery_canary.spec.ts (TP-077-02-02 + TP-077-02-02R) PASS in the live e2e-ui run. Single-line extension of the SCOPE-1a shell-test discovery loop walks tests/unit/{cli,web,docs}/ so the new shell tests auto-discover under ./smackerel.sh test unit.

web/pwa/tests/auth_login.spec.ts ships covering spec 057 SCOPE-4 rows 4.1–4.5 with real headless-Chromium driver assertions; TP-077-03-01..03-05 + TP-077-03-07 all PASS in the SCOPE-3 GREEN run (13 passed, 9 skipped fixme). _support/csp.ts hardened from SCOPE-1b skeleton into a real console + pageerror + securitypolicyviolation guard with assertNoCSPViolations(page) drain assertion. qf_decisions_surface.spec.ts TP-077-03-08 (F-077-3-001) fixed by reading template.content.textContent + querySelectorAll counts via page.evaluate instead of trying to descend into the inert <template> document fragment with locator(). tests/unit/web/spec_077_no_stub_bodies_test.sh PASS (TP-077-03-06). scripts/runtime/web-e2e-ui.sh bring_up_test_stack now exports SMACKEREL_AUTH_TOKEN from config/generated/test.env so the login spec can drive /v1/web/login. Spec 057 F-057-V-001 observation flipped to resolved with pointer to spec 077 SCOPE-3 evidence; specs/_ops/F-057-V-001-e2e-ui-harness/README.md status flipped to routed_resolved. F-077-3-001 rework-queue entry routed to this scope and addressed.

scopeProgress.name: Node Tooling Runner + Playwright Config Fail-Loud
Discovery Convention, CI Lane, and Docs
First Real Consumer: Login Flow + CSP Smoke

reworkQueueArchive.summary: smackerel-core failed Compose healthcheck under disposable e2e-ui project due to assistant facade synchronous /embed startup dependency. Closed by goroutine-deferred startup; residual observation reclassified as F-077-1c-002.
proof_of_life.spec.ts contract gated on HTTP < 400 but bearer-auth-gated PWA root returns 401; 401 actually proves harness reached the live core.
reworkQueueArchive.resolution: proof-of-life contract revised to accept HTTP 200 OR 401 as proof-of-served; spec body, scopes.md SCN-077-A01 Gherkin, Implementation Plan, and 'After Scope 1c' success line updated.

reworkQueueArchive.summary: qf_decisions_surface.spec.ts line 15 used page.locator('body').toContainText against text that only exists inside an inert <template>; pre-existing test-authoring bug, not a harness defect.
reworkQueueArchive.resolution: Fixed by reading template.content via page.evaluate(el => ({ text: el.content.textContent, counts: ... })); TP-077-03-08 PASS in SCOPE-3 GREEN run.

executionHistory.summary: Planning-only bootstrap of foundation spec 077 closing ops packet F-057-V-001-e2e-ui-harness. Three-scope plan: Playwright runner foundation, discovery/CI/docs, first real consumer (spec 057 SCOPE-4 login flow + CSP smoke). Eight SCN-077-A0N scenarios authored.

Split SCOPE-1 into 1a (Compose-project lane + dispatcher), 1b (Node tooling runner + Playwright fail-loud), 1c (proof-of-life spec + Go isolation tests) per bubbles.implement route_required so each sub-scope produces independently-verifiable RED->GREEN evidence. Added SCN-077-A09 (dispatcher anchor for 1a) and SCN-077-A10 (fail-loud anchor for 1b). Re-routed SCN-077-A01 and SCN-077-A07 from SCOPE-01 to SCOPE-1c. Scopes 2 and 3 now depend on Scope 1c. test-plan.json authored.

Resolved F-077-1c-002 by revising proof-of-life contract to accept HTTP 200 OR 401 (served-and-auth-gated proof). Updated web/pwa/tests/proof_of_life.spec.ts, scopes.md#scope-1c (Gherkin SCN-077-A01, Implementation Plan, success line). Investigated F-077-3-001 (qf_decisions_surface.spec.ts:15 fails because template content is invisible to body toContainText) — routed as Known Drift under scopes.md#scope-3 with new TP-077-03-08 row and matching DoD checkbox. State.json reworkQueue updated: F-077-1c-001 superseded, F-077-1c-002 resolved, F-077-3-001 routed.

statusDiscipline.scopePickupRule: All dependsOn scopes must be Done. Pick the lowest-numbered eligible scope.
statusDiscipline.specDoneRequires: All scopes done. certification.completedScopes contains all scope IDs and bubbles.validate has certified promotion.

notes: Foundation spec; routed from ops packet F-057-V-001-e2e-ui-harness.
